description: r4t — Roster For Teams. Namespace node: bind a prefix with `a8s namespace <prefix> <node>` and tell <prefix>:<member>. Roster in <root>/ROSTER.md; harness config out-of-repo at ~/.r4t/harnesses.json (append --roster / --harness-config to override). The idle invoke resolves the sole ~/.r4t team; with multiple teams, copy this file per node and append "--node", "<prefix>".
